attrs.comment: Pixel offsets tracked using Imcorr. Input files were /snufkin/projects/cci/s2raw/s2raw/25WDS/2017-07-23/Seq00/B02.tiff and /snufkin/projects/cci/s2raw/s2raw/25WDS/2017-07-30/Seq00/B02.tiff. Intrinsic S2 shift (faulty georeferencing) estimated  as (x,y) = (0.4775, -0.1708) pixels. Shift was corrected. Pixel offsets converted to m/day using scaling dx_in_meters/dt_in_days = 10.0/7.0 = 1.4.
attrs.history:
2018-06-11 17:34:32 | Combined 1 input files ['/snufkin/projects/cci/ensemble/25WDS/2017-07-21_to_2017-08-08/2017-07-23_Seq00_to_2017-07-30_Seq00.nc'] by weighted average. Weights were cubed inverse RMS of velocity field. RMS was computed with 5x5 kernel.

2018-06-11 17:37:34 | Stacked in time from 2 input files ['/snufkin/projects/cci/stacked/25WDS/2017-07-21_to_2017-08-08.nc', '/snufkin/projects/cci/stacked/25WDS/2017-07-30_to_2017-08-20.nc'].
attrs.summary: Ice Velocity time series of Kangerdlugssuaq Glacier from Sentinel-2 data acquired between the 2017-07-21 and 2017-08-20
attrs.title: Kangerdlugssuaq_TimeSeries_20170721_20170820
